raw_consumer_statement: HELLO MY NAME IS XXXX XXXX, I PREVIOUSLY MADE A COMPLAINT FOR A DISPUTE THAT NEVER TOOK PLACE ON MY CREDIT CARD, THE DISPUTE WAS NOW CLOSED AND I SEE THAT THEY GIVEN ME THE CREDITS FOR THE FRAUDULENT TRANSACTIONS IN MY ACCOUNT, BUT THEY ALSO REMOVED THE CREDITS AGAIN, THE SYSTEM SHOWS 3 TIMES THEY GIVEN ME THE CREDIT AND 3 TIMES THEY REMOVED IT, IN THE END THIS CONFLICT HAS NOT BEEN RESOLVED, IT SEEMS THAT THE AGENT WHO WAS HANDLING MY CASE DID NOT KNOW HOW TO HANDLE THIS CASE
